description: Sample diagnosis requests for Maintenance Wizard API

payload.query: Equipment has been showing increasing vibration over the past 2 weeks. Latest reading is 8.7 mm/s. Unusual grinding noise audible from bearing housing.
Main drive motor temperature has risen from normal 65°C to 92°C over 3 days. Cooling fan appears to be running.
Hydraulic pressure dropping gradually. Started at 280 bar, now at 190 bar. No visible leaks detected externally.
Estimate remaining useful life for this equipment based on current sensor trends and maintenance history.
